ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., upcoming, in-progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was last updated */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "home_team_score_halftime" INTEGER /* Halftime score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score_halftime" INTEGER /* Halftime score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's current manager */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "home_kit_color" TEXT /* Color of the home kit */,
  "away_kit_color" TEXT /* Color of the away kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the league's social media profiles */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division or tier of the league */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the odds are for */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "home_team_odds" REAL /* Odds for the home team to win */,
  "away_team_odds" REAL /* Odds for the away team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds record was last updated */,
  "over_under_line" REAL /* Over/under line for the match */,
  "handicap_home_team" REAL /* Handicap for the home team */,
  "handicap_away_team" REAL /* Handicap for the away team */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the odds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the bookmaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the bookmaker */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the bookmaker was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the bookmaker's logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the bookmaker's social media profiles */,
  "customer_support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result is for */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  "home_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the home team */,
  "away_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the away team */,
  "home_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the home team */,
  "away_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the away team */,
  "home_team_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners for the home team */,
  "away_team_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners for the away team */,
  "home_team_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "away_team_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
